metadata.description: Deterministic security scanner for infrastructure configs - Docker Compose, Dockerfile, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Terraform, secrets. 70 rules, reproducible verdicts, zero network calls.

plugins.name: sentinel-scanner
plugins.description: Gives the agent a deterministic IaC security scanner: scan Compose/Dockerfile/K8s/GHA/Terraform/.env files, fix findings by source line, re-scan until CLEARED, and verify report digests. Same engine as the Sentinel CLI and web demo.
